features: List of custom reminders showing Time, Subtitle/Label, and Ringtone type.
Toggle switches for each reminder to turn them on or off.
Medication Reminders section (fetches schedule from the database).
Floating Action Button (+) to create a new reminder.
List of historical system alerts and notifications (e.g., Obstacles, Low Battery, SOS triggered).
Empty state UI ('No alerts at the moment') featuring a large bell icon.

account.description: Displays User Name and User ID. Tapping it navigates to the edit profile screen.

robot_configuration.description: Displays the connected Robot's ID (e.g., SERBOT-NC-001) with a QR code scanner icon to pair.

global_background_features: Background BLE connection persistence and telemetry polling.
Firebase sync for remote guardian access and medication schedule updates.
